name: Meatball Chili Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix half of the Picante Sauce, beef, chips, egg and garlic powder thoroughly and shape firmly into 24 meatballs.
2. In a Dutch oven over medium high heat, heat the oil. Cook the meatballs in 2 batches until evenly browned. Set aside. Pour off fat.
3. Add remaining Picante Sauce, chili powder, tomatoes and beans. Bring to a boil. Return meatballs to the pan. Cover and cook on low heat for 10 minutes or until meatballs are done. Top with cilantro and additional crushed tortilla chips.
